project_reference.core_research_question: Which quantum-information ingredients are sufficient to recover the leading Ryu-Takayanagi formula, and which steps still require semiclassical gravitational input?
project_reference.current_focus: Phase 02 — JLMS and operator algebra QEC backbone for entanglement wedge reconstruction

scope.question: Which quantum-information ingredients are sufficient to recover the leading Ryu-Takayanagi formula and identify the first controlled corrections, and which steps still require bulk gravitational input?
in_scope: Map the logical chain linking holographic entanglement entropy, operator-algebra quantum error correction, JLMS relative entropy, entanglement wedge reconstruction, and tensor-network toy models.
Benchmark each step against foundational and recent arXiv anchors relevant to the RT formula from a quantum-information viewpoint.
out_of_scope: Deriving bulk Einstein equations or the gravitational replica trick from first principles.
Full quantum extremal surface or island computations beyond identifying where they modify the RT story.
Explicit numerical AdS/CFT calculations for specific holographic CFT states.
unresolved_questions: Can the leading area term be derived from quantum-information structure alone without importing semiclassical geometric input?
Which recent modular-flow or entropy-inequality results materially tighten the RT-from-QI story rather than merely repackage known structure?

context_gaps: Broader 2025-2026 literature coverage beyond Gao24 and Bao25 still needs expansion.
Need sharper discrimination between restricted-scope derivations and genuinely generic derivations of the area term.
crucial_inputs: Foundational arXiv literature on holographic entanglement entropy and quantum error correction.
Recent arXiv work on modular flow or holographic entropy inequalities that could expose new quantum-information constraints.

formulations: Operator-algebra quantum error correction / subregion-subregion duality.
Relative entropy and modular flow arguments in semiclassical AdS/CFT.
Random tensor network and entropy-inequality toy models as controlled heuristics.
allowed_estimator_families: tensor-network minimal-cut analyses tied back to explicit assumptions
forbidden_estimator_families: analogy-only arguments that never isolate the source of the area term
toy-model matches presented as derivations without checking imported geometric input
allowed_fit_families: proof-style dependency tracing between claims and references
forbidden_fit_families: citation-dump summaries without a dependency graph
qualitative consensus statements unsupported by explicit anchors
stop_and_rethink_conditions: Every candidate quantum-information derivation still assumes the bulk area term or semiclassical geometry as an input.
Recent literature only extends entanglement wedge reconstruction after the RT formula, leaving the core derivation question untouched.

observables.name: Leading Ryu-Takayanagi area term
observables.definition: Identify which quantum-information inputs reproduce or fail to reproduce S_A = Area(gamma_A)/(4 G_N).

observables.name: Entanglement wedge reconstruction criterion
observables.definition: Whether the boundary subregion A supports reconstruction of operators in the bulk entanglement wedge a via JLMS/OAQEC reasoning.

observables.name: Frontier constraint set
observables.definition: Classify recent modular-flow and entropy-inequality results as genuine advances, heuristic support, or orthogonal structure.

claims.statement: A literature-grounded dependency map can distinguish which parts of the RT story follow from quantum-information structure and which parts still rely on semiclassical gravitational input.

deliverables.description: Synthesis note that traces the RT formula, JLMS, OAQEC, entanglement wedge reconstruction, and tensor-network models through an explicit dependency chain.
must_contain: explicit statement of imported semiclassical inputs

deliverables.description: Gap analysis separating genuine derivation, controlled heuristic support, and open conjectural steps in the RT-from-quantum-information program.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Check that each logical step in the synthesis is explicitly tied to at least one approved arXiv anchor and that missing steps remain marked as gaps.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: No major RT-from-QI claim is left without an anchor or an explicit uncertainty label.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Verify that the deliverables distinguish between leading RT, bulk entropy corrections, entanglement wedge reconstruction, and frontier constraints without conflating them.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Each of the four layers is assigned a status: derived, heuristic, or unresolved, with rationale.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-main
acceptance_tests.procedure: Reject any conclusion that treats tensor-network minimal cuts or qualitative QEC analogies as a full derivation unless the imported geometric assumptions are enumerated.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: False-progress modes are named explicitly and excluded from the success claim.

references.locator: Shinsei Ryu and Tadashi Takayanagi, Holographic Derivation of Entanglement Entropy from AdS/CFT, arXiv:hep-th/0603001
references.why_it_matters: Foundational statement of the leading RT formula to be explained from quantum-information structure.

references.locator: Ahmed Almheiri, Xi Dong, and Daniel Harlow, Bulk Locality and Quantum Error Correction in AdS/CFT, arXiv:1411.7041
references.why_it_matters: Introduces the QEC language that motivates subregion duality and the RT/QEC connection.

references.locator: Daniel L. Jafferis, Aitor Lewkowycz, Juan Maldacena, and S. Josephine Suh, Relative entropy equals bulk relative entropy, arXiv:1512.06431
references.why_it_matters: Connects boundary relative entropy to bulk relative entropy and underlies entanglement wedge reconstruction logic.

references.locator: Xi Dong, Daniel Harlow, and Aron C. Wall, Reconstruction of Bulk Operators within the Entanglement Wedge in Gauge-Gravity Duality, arXiv:1601.05416
references.why_it_matters: Sharpens the QI route from JLMS/QEC to entanglement wedge reconstruction.

references.locator: Patrick Hayden, Sepehr Nezami, Xiao-Liang Qi, Nathaniel Thomas, Michael Walter, and Zhao Yang, Holographic duality from random tensor networks, arXiv:1601.01694
references.why_it_matters: Provides the cleanest quantum-information toy model reproducing RT and its bulk-entropy correction structure.

references.locator: Ping Gao, Modular flow in JT gravity and entanglement wedge reconstruction, arXiv:2402.18655
references.why_it_matters: Recent modular-flow result relevant to the frontier of entanglement wedge reconstruction from an information-theoretic angle.

references.locator: Ning Bao, Hao Geng, and Yikun Jiang, Ryu-Takayanagi Formula for Multi-Boundary Black Holes from 2D Large-c CFT Ensemble, arXiv:2504.12388
references.why_it_matters: Provides a restricted-scope 2025 derivation claim for RT from boundary CFT data in multi-boundary AdS3/CFT2 large-c ensembles.

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-main
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Treating random tensor network minimal cuts as a derivation of the bulk area term without enumerating the geometric assumptions built into the network.
forbidden_proxies.reason: This would blur the difference between heuristic toy-model support and a true derivation.

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-main
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Equating entanglement wedge reconstruction with a derivation of the RT formula itself.
forbidden_proxies.reason: Reconstruction usually presupposes semiclassical ingredients that already know about RT or JLMS.

weakest_anchors: Whether any existing quantum-information argument derives the leading area term without importing semiclassical geometry in generic holographic states.
Whether Bao25-style derivations generalize beyond special multi-boundary AdS3/CFT2 ensemble states.
unvalidated_assumptions: Large-N semiclassical factorization is sufficient background for the entire argument chain.
Toy-model tensor networks preserve the same notion of geometric area as semiclassical gravity.
competing_explanations: The RT formula may fundamentally require the gravitational replica trick, with quantum information providing only consistency checks and reconstruction structure.
The main quantum-information insight may be about subregion duality and corrections, not the origin of the leading area term.
disconfirming_observations: Many proposed quantum-information derivation steps still assume the area term or equivalent semiclassical input upstream.
Recent frontier papers either improve reconstruction (Gao24) or derive RT only in restricted large-c multi-boundary ensembles (Bao25), leaving generality unsettled.

position.current_phase_name: JLMS and operator algebra QEC backbone for entanglement wedge reconstruction

active_calculations: Dependency map: RT leading term versus JLMS, OAQEC, and entanglement wedge reconstruction
Heuristic gap audit: random tensor networks, Gao24 modular flow, and Bao25 multi-boundary ensemble advances

intermediate_results.description: Leading Ryu-Takayanagi formula for static semiclassical states
JLMS relative entropy equality in the semiclassical code-subspace regime
Entanglement wedge reconstruction follows from JLMS plus operator-algebra QEC in the code subspace
intermediate_results.validity: semiclassical code subspace with subregion duality

intermediate_results.description: Random tensor networks reproduce RT-like weighted-minimal-cut structure with a bulk entropy correction

intermediate_results.equation: General QI-only derivation remains unverified beyond special multi-boundary AdS3/CFT2 ensembles
intermediate_results.description: Current frontier assessment: Bao25 supplies a restricted-scope derivation claim, but the generic gap remains the leading geometric area contribution
intermediate_results.validity: based on the current anchor set through Gao24 and Bao25

open_questions: Can the leading area term be derived from quantum-information structure alone without importing semiclassical geometric input?
Does Bao25 generalize beyond multi-boundary AdS3/CFT2 large-c ensemble states?
How much of the JLMS plus operator-algebra QEC chain is logically independent of the RT formula itself?
Which post-2024 modular-flow or entropy-inequality papers materially change the RT derivation question rather than only the reconstruction story?

decisions.summary: Anchor the project on explicit arXiv references from RT06 through Bao25
decisions.rationale: Keeps the RT-from-QI story tied to auditable literature rather than analogy-driven summaries

decisions.summary: Keep RT06 as benchmark input and do not collapse downstream reconstruction results into an origin derivation.
decisions.rationale: The current anchor chain still needs the leading semiclassical formula as a target rather than a consequence.

decisions.summary: Treat random tensor networks as heuristic support rather than a derivation of the area term
decisions.rationale: The toy model reproduces RT-like structure, but the geometric input is not eliminated and must stay visible as an imported assumption

decisions.summary: Treat Gao24 as reconstruction-side progress and Bao25 as a restricted-scope derivation claim, not a generic closure of the RT-origin problem.
decisions.rationale: The frontier now contains real post-2024 progress, but its scope stays narrower than the full holographic derivation question.

decisions.summary: Working hypothesis: reconstruction and correction results remain more general than current derivations of the leading area term
decisions.rationale: Bao25 narrows the gap in a special AdS3/CFT2 ensemble, but it does not yet settle the generic holographic case.

approximations.name: Semiclassical large-N bulk limit
approximations.validity_range: large N, small G_N, code-subspace regime

approximations.name: Random tensor networks as heuristic stand-ins for geometry

convention_lock.coordinate_system: boundary time t with spatial region A; bulk AdS uses Poincare coordinates (z,t,vec{x}) unless a cited anchor specifies otherwise

propagated_uncertainties.quantity: QI-only derivation status of the RT area term
propagated_uncertainties.value: unresolved in general; special-case progress exists
Gao24 and Bao25 verified; broader search still incomplete

session.stopped_at: Session 5 probed repair paths, reran validators, audited dependency/state surfaces, and updated journal.md, report.md, and HANDOFF.md

handoff.stopped_at: Session 5 probed repair paths, reran validators, audited dependency/state surfaces, and updated journal.md, report.md, and HANDOFF.md
